evidence.description: Öcalan adapted Bookchin's libertarian municipalism into democratic confederalism while imprisoned on Imrali island after 1999. He described himself as Bookchin's student and attempted to arrange a meeting before Bookchin died in July 2006. The PKK formally adopted democratic confederalism around 2005.

editorial_notes: Ideological mentorship — Bookchin's libertarian municipalism became the basis for Öcalan's democratic confederalism.
